generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingDimmerActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System actuator for adaptive lighting dimming, integrated with BIM model using domain-specific extensions to represent spatial, functional, and operational attributes. Executes commands from Digital Twin via Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware for real-time control adjustments."
    base:isContainedIn AECOBuildingEnvironment
]

instance HVACDamperActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System actuator for HVAC system dampers, modeled within BIM environment with runtime metadata for bidirectional communication. Enables real-time adjustments based on Digital Twin optimization policies."
    base:isContainedIn AECOBuildingEnvironment
]

instance MotorizedShadeActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-enabled actuator for motorized window shades, integrated into BIM model with control logic for adaptive shading. Synchronized with Digital Twin via Eclipse Ditto for dynamic adjustments based on occupancy and environmental conditions."
    base:isContainedIn AECOBuildingEnvironment
]

instance SmartControllerActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Centralized IoT controller actuator managing multiple building systems (lighting, HVAC, shades) with reinforcement learning-based control policies. Executes optimized commands derived from Digital Twin simulations."
    base:isContainedIn AECOBuildingEnvironment
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-enabled occupancy sensor deployed in physical building spaces to detect presence and movement patterns. Integrated into BIM model with metadata for runtime configurations via Eclipse Hono/Ditto."
    base:isContainedIn AECOBuildingEnvironment
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensor measuring temperature and humidity levels in building zones. Data ingested via Eclipse Hono for real-time synchronization with Digital Twin's BIM model."
    base:isContainedIn AECOBuildingEnvironment
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

instance LuminositySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Light intensity sensor monitoring illuminance levels across building spaces. Used for adaptive lighting control policies in BOREALIS project."
    base:isContainedIn AECOBuildingEnvironment
    DTDFVocab:producedData LuminosityDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Smart energy meter tracking real-time consumption of building systems (HVAC, lighting, etc.). Data normalized and processed for Digital Twin's predictive analytics."
    base:isContainedIn AECOBuildingEnvironment
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnvironmentalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureHumiditySensor
]

instance LuminosityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LuminositySensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyMeter
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantic backbone of the Digital Twin containing geometric, spatial, and functional data of building components. Enriched with runtime metadata including device IDs, control logic, and middleware configurations."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinFramework
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler, BIMToolEnabler
]

instance RuntimeData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time operational data ingested from IoT sensors via Eclipse Hono/Ditto. Includes occupancy, environmental conditions, and energy consumption metrics."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinFramework
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted, EnvironmentalDataTransmitted, LuminosityDataTransmitted, EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance ControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Domain-specific configurations for Building Control Systems embedded within BIM (e.g., TwinLight's lighting control semantics). Defines operational policies for actuators and sensors."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinFramework
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Physics-based or data-driven models for predictive analytics (e.g., energy consumption, thermal performance). Used for forecasting building system behavior under various conditions."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinFramework
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance VisualizationAsset : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D models and interactive interfaces generated via Unreal Engine 5 for immersive monitoring of building operations. Enables real-time visualization of sensor data and simulation results."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinFramework
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5Enabler
]

instance ServiceSpecificData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Custom datasets for specialized services like reinforcement learning (e.g., BOREALIS project's training data for adaptive lighting optimization)."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinFramework
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReinforcementLearningEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Automates extraction of domain semantics from BIM models and generates runtime artifacts (middleware configurations, control logic) via model-to-model and model-to-text transformations."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinFramework
    DTDFVocab:enables AutomatedDeploymentService, ControlLogicService
]

instance EclipseHonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Provides IoT connectivity and real-time data ingestion for bidirectional communication between physical and virtual systems. Normalizes sensor data for Digital Twin processing."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinFramework
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance EclipseDittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Manages digital twin instances and their lifecycle, enabling standardized device representation and data exchange between BIM and physical systems."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinFramework
    DTDFVocab:enables DeviceManagementService, RuntimeSynchronizationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Delivers rich, interactive 3D visualization for monitoring and simulation of building operations. Integrates with Digital Twin data for immersive facility management."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinFramework
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService, DecisionSupportService
]

instance BIMToolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Used by building control engineers to model devices and define control logic within BIM environment (e.g., Revit, ArchiCAD). Supports domain-specific extensions for Digital Twin integration."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinFramework
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelEnrichmentService, ValidationService
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Executes physics-based and data-driven simulation models for building performance analysis. Provides input for predictive analytics and optimization services."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinFramework
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService, EnergyOptimizationService
]

instance ReinforcementLearningEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Implements machine learning algorithms for adaptive control policies (e.g., BOREALIS project's reinforcement learning for lighting optimization). Evolves control strategies using post-occupancy sensor data."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinFramework
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveControlService, PolicyRefinementService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Facilitates live updates on building performance metrics (energy usage, occupant comfort) via Unreal Engine 5 visualization. Aggregates data from all sensing components for centralized monitoring."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinFramework
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingPerformanceInsight, OccupantComfortInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Executes simulations and optimization models to forecast energy consumption, maintenance needs, and system failures. Uses BIM-enriched models and real-time sensor data."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinFramework
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionForecast, MaintenanceNeedPrediction, SystemFailureAlert
]

instance AdaptiveControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Implements reinforcement learning-based optimization of building systems (e.g., adaptive lighting) to balance energy efficiency, visual comfort, and health effects. Dynamically adjusts control policies based on real-time data."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinFramework
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingOptimizationAction, HVACOptimizationAction, EnergyEfficiencyAction
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides immersive 3D monitoring of building operations through Unreal Engine 5 interfaces. Enables facility managers to visualize sensor data, simulation results, and control adjustments in real-time."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinFramework
    DTDFVocab:provides ImmersiveMonitoringInsight, SimulationVisualizationInsight
]

instance AutomatedDeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Scans BIM models for 'twinnable' devices, extracts metadata (tenant/device IDs), and generates runtime configurations for Eclipse Hono/Ditto. Automates the deployment of Digital Twin components."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinFramework
    DTDFVocab:provides DeploymentConfigurationAction, DeviceRegistrationAction
]

instance DeviceManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Manages lifecycle of digital twin instances and physical devices via Eclipse Ditto. Handles device registration, configuration updates, and bidirectional communication synchronization."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinFramework
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviceLifecycleManagementInsight, ConfigurationUpdateAction
]

instance ModelEnrichmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Extends BIM models with runtime metadata (device configurations, control logic) using domain-specific extensions. Prepares models for Digital Twin deployment and synchronization."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinFramework
    DTDFVocab:provides EnrichedBIMModelInsight, MetadataIntegrationAction
]

instance ValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Validates enriched BIM models for consistency and completeness using model validation techniques. Ensures all components are properly configured for Digital Twin operations."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinFramework
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelValidationInsight, ConsistencyReportAction
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimizes building energy consumption through simulation-driven recommendations and real-time adjustments. Integrates with adaptive control systems for maximum efficiency."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinFramework
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergySavingsInsight, OptimizationRecommendationAction
]

instance PolicyRefinementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Iteratively refines control policies using reinforcement learning and post-occupancy sensor data. Adapts building systems to changing occupancy patterns and environmental conditions."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinFramework
    DTDFVocab:provides PolicyImprovementInsight, DynamicAdjustmentAction
]

instance DecisionSupportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides actionable insights for facility managers and engineers to make data-driven decisions (e.g., refurbishment plans, system reconfigurations). Aggregates insights from all Digital Twin services."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinFramework
    DTDFVocab:provides StrategicDecisionInsight, RefurbishmentRecommendationAction
]

instance ControlLogicService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Manages domain-specific control logic configurations embedded within BIM models. Ensures proper synchronization between virtual control policies and physical actuators."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinFramework
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlPolicyInsight, LogicValidationAction
]

instance RuntimeSynchronizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Maintains bidirectional synchronization between Digital Twin and physical systems via Eclipse Hono/Ditto. Ensures real-time data consistency for accurate monitoring and control."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinFramework
    DTDFVocab:provides SynchronizationStatusInsight, DataConsistencyAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance BuildingPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comprehensive overview of current building performance metrics including energy usage, system efficiency, and operational status. Updated in real-time via sensor data."
]

instance OccupantComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of occupant comfort levels based on environmental conditions (temperature, humidity, lighting) and occupancy patterns. Used to adjust building systems dynamically."
]

instance EnergyConsumptionForecast : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analysis of future energy consumption based on current usage patterns, weather forecasts, and building occupancy predictions. Enables proactive energy management."
]

instance MaintenanceNeedPrediction : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecast of upcoming maintenance requirements based on equipment performance data and historical failure patterns. Prioritizes maintenance tasks to prevent system downtime."
]

instance SystemFailureAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time alerts for potential system failures detected through anomaly detection in sensor data and simulation models. Includes root cause analysis and recommended corrective actions."
]

instance LightingOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustments to lighting systems based on occupancy, luminosity, and energy efficiency goals. Implements reinforcement learning policies from BOREALIS project."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HVACOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic control of HVAC systems to balance energy efficiency, thermal comfort, and indoor air quality. Adjusts damper positions and setpoints based on real-time sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnergyEfficiencyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "System-wide energy optimization actions including demand response participation, peak shaving, and load shedding recommendations. Prioritizes actions based on cost and comfort tradeoffs."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ImmersiveMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of building operations in Unreal Engine 5 showing real-time sensor data overlays, system status, and performance metrics. Enables intuitive monitoring and troubleshooting."
]

instance SimulationVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization of simulation results including energy consumption scenarios, thermal performance maps, and system behavior under different conditions."
]

instance DeploymentConfigurationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated generation of runtime configurations for Eclipse Hono/Ditto based on BIM model metadata. Includes device registration, endpoint mapping, and data flow definitions."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DeviceRegistrationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated registration of physical devices in the Digital Twin system via Eclipse Ditto. Includes metadata extraction, device profiling, and initial synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnrichedBIMModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation report confirming all BIM model components are properly enriched with runtime metadata required for Digital Twin operations. Identifies any missing or inconsistent configurations."
]

instance MetadataIntegrationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Integration of runtime metadata into BIM models including device IDs, control logic references, and middleware connection details. Ensures seamless communication between virtual and physical systems."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ModelValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comprehensive validation report assessing BIM model consistency, completeness, and readiness for Digital Twin deployment. Includes automated checks against domain-specific constraints."
]

instance ConsistencyReportAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generation of consistency reports comparing physical system state with Digital Twin model. Identifies discrepancies requiring manual intervention or system adjustments."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnergySavingsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quantitative analysis of energy savings achieved through Digital Twin optimization actions. Compares current consumption with baseline and potential scenarios."
]

instance OptimizationRecommendationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated recommendations for building system optimizations including setpoint adjustments, scheduling changes, and equipment reconfigurations. Prioritized by cost-effectiveness and comfort impact."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PolicyImprovementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of control policy performance improvements over time based on reinforcement learning metrics. Includes success rates, energy savings, and comfort improvements."
]

instance DynamicAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustments to control policies based on evolving occupancy patterns and environmental conditions. Implements iterative refinements from reinforcement learning algorithms."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance StrategicDecisionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "High-level insights supporting strategic decisions such as refurbishment planning, system upgrades, and long-term energy management strategies. Aggregates data from all Digital Twin services."
]

instance RefurbishmentRecommendationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Data-driven recommendations for building refurbishment including component replacements, system upgrades, and spatial reconfigurations. Prioritized by cost-benefit analysis and performance impact."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ControlPolicyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current status of all control policies including their configuration, performance metrics, and compliance with building requirements. Used for policy validation and optimization."
]

instance LogicValidationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Validation of control logic configurations against domain standards and building requirements. Identifies potential conflicts or suboptimal policies requiring adjustment."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SynchronizationStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time status of data synchronization between physical systems and Digital Twin. Monitors latency, data quality, and synchronization errors across all connected devices."
]

instance DataConsistencyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated correction of data inconsistencies between physical systems and Digital Twin models. Includes conflict resolution, data normalization, and synchronization recovery procedures."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DeviceLifecycleManagementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comprehensive overview of device lifecycle status including registration, configuration, and operational state across all connected devices in the Digital Twin system."
]

instance ConfigurationUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated updates to device configurations in the Digital Twin system via Eclipse Ditto. Includes parameter adjustments, firmware updates, and connection endpoint modifications."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C1: Environment
instance AECOBuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical environment comprising buildings and their operational systems within the Architecture, Engineering, Construction, and Operations (AECO) domain."
]

instance DigitalTwinFramework : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Centralized Digital Twin framework orchestrating interactions between BIM models, middleware, and visualization tools for building operations management."
    base:contains BIMModel, RuntimeData, ControlLogicModel, SimulationModel, VisualizationAsset, ServiceSpecificData,
                 ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler, EclipseHonoEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler, UnrealEngine5Enabler,
                 BIMToolEnabler, SimulationEnabler, ReinforcementLearningEnabler,
                 RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, AdaptiveControlService, InteractiveVisualizationService,
                 AutomatedDeploymentService, DeviceManagementService, ModelEnrichmentService, ValidationService,
                 EnergyOptimizationService, PolicyRefinementService, DecisionSupportService, ControlLogicService,
                 RuntimeSynchronizationService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interactions are enabled through **automated control signal generation** and **bidirectional communication** via Eclipse Hono/Ditto. The DT processes real-time data and generates control commands (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC setpoints) that are transmitted back to the physical Building Control Systems (BCS). The framework supports **runtime configuration management**, allowing dynamic adjustments to control policies without redeployment. For example, the TwinLight project demonstrates how BIM-embedded control semantics are used to automate commissioning and bidirectional communication between virtual models and physical lighting systems."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is characterized by **real-time synchronization** between the Physical Twin and Digital Twin, with data exchange occurring at **sub-second to second-level intervals** depending on sensor and system configurations. The framework supports **iterative refinement** of control policies (e.g., via reinforcement learning in BOREALIS), where adjustments are made dynamically based on live sensor data. While specific latency metrics are not detailed, the emphasis is on **low-latency, high-frequency updates** to ensure the DT remains an accurate reflection of the physical system."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture** with the following components:
  1. **BIM Core**: The central semantic model integrating static and dynamic building data.
  2. **Middleware Layer**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto for real-time data exchange and device management.
  3. **Control Layer**: Embedded control logic (e.g., TwinLight’s lighting control semantics) and reinforcement learning models (e.g., BOREALIS’s adaptive policies).
  4. **Visualization Layer**: Unreal Engine 5 for immersive monitoring and simulation.
  5. **Service Layer**: Modular services (e.g., predictive analytics, automated commissioning) integrated via standardized extension points.
  The constellation supports **bidirectional data flow** between the physical and virtual worlds, with each layer contributing to the DT’s entanglement (measured via ODTE)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates across the **entire building life cycle**, covering phases from **initial design** (BIM modeling), **construction** (clash detection, coordination), **operation** (real-time monitoring, control), to **refurbishment and adaptations**. The framework ensures continuity by leveraging BIM’s semantic richness for design and extending it with runtime capabilities for operational phases, as demonstrated in the **Living Lab case study**."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity is evaluated using the **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**, which measures the alignment between the digital and physical systems. The framework includes **model validation** steps to ensure semantic consistency before deployment. While **semantic drift** (divergence over time) is acknowledged in related work, the current implementation focuses on **real-time synchronization** and **automated data normalization** to maintain coherence."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT uses **Eclipse Hono** for IoT connectivity and **Ditto** for digital twin management, enabling **real-time data exchange** via standardized protocols. The framework supports **bidirectional communication** between physical assets and the DT, but specific protocols (e.g., MQTT, HTTP/JSON) are not detailed in the provided documents. The focus is on **interoperability** and **automated endpoint configuration** from BIM metadata."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The framework emphasizes **standardized integration mechanisms** to enable interoperability across heterogeneous systems. While specific APIs (e.g., IFC, bSDD) are not mentioned, the use of **Eclipse IoT tools** (Hono, Ditto) and **BIM as a semantic backbone** facilitates cross-platform compatibility. The goal is to support **modular service integration** and **scalable deployment** across AECO workflows."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework adheres to **AECO-specific standards** such as **BIM** and leverages **Eclipse IoT** tools (Hono, Ditto) for interoperability. While specific standards (e.g., ISO/IEC 23247, OASIS) are not cited, the use of **model-driven engineering (MDE)** and **standardized extension points** ensures alignment with domain-wide best practices for DT deployment."
]
